notes: Checkpoint/resume is framework-local; business task success and rollback blast-radius gates still needed for production-ready. C: add outcome-based promotion criterion.
3% handoff failure alone can mislead if low-impact or auto-recovered. C: use severity-weighted handoff failure and business impact before downgrade.
Mandatory from day-1 can block teams with legacy tools. C: phased MCP adoption with exception inventory; new integrations only first.
Curation risk is real; discovery-only is one mitigation. C: add version/compatibility check before any server import.
Optimal for mid-scale is context-dependent; small static corpus may not need full stack. C: label as default for balanced/growth profile only.
Always-on reranker adds latency/cost; conditional reranking by uncertainty needed. C: adopt conditional reranking policy.
Sufficient only when org has mesh capacity; small team may need lighter stack. C: label as scale profile and add minimal profile.
Cascade is evidenced; mitigation is rollback and routing bundle. C: add cascade to runbook and rollback drill.
Regressions can hide defects; trace completeness threshold is mitigation. C: add trace completeness to release gate.
Metric drift is real; freeze eval dataset and benchmark config is mitigation. C: document metric freeze and revert procedure.
Rule drift can increase false rejects; version guard specs and rollback help. C: add rule version and reject-rate monitoring.
Some policy engines are embedded; separation not always feasible. C: allow combined rollout with stricter canary when separation impossible.
Crawl P0 bar is an open question not a claim; multi-repo vs multi-URL needs definition. C: define and document in adoption_backlog.
Same-URL same-time is method not yet done; parity claim premature. C: add controlled benchmark to backlog before parity conclusion.
Baseline is unknown not claim; benchmarks needed to make adoption criteria. C: add token/context benchmark to research backlog.
Feature vs adoption evidence is distinction not yet applied in backlog. C: label Firecrawl as feature signal until adoption metrics added.
Coverage expansion is recommendation not validated claim. C: add ForgeCrawl RagRabbit Crawl2RAG to next scan scope with P2 trigger.
Frequency from issue text may not match production incident root cause. C: cross-check with internal incident taxonomy; add production-weight option.
Adapters add maintenance and can lag multi-version support. C: document adapter maintenance SLA and version support window.

C7-B-016/C8-A07: expiry without enforcement leads to permanent exceptions. Manual expiry insufficient; automated exception-expiry check and escalation required. C: implement automated expiry and document in risk register.
